title: Thin Tools/Guides Triage — Audit Only, No Pruning
methodology: 28-day GSC data cross-referenced with sitemap URL list. Content depth assessed by type pattern.

guides_125.description: 'How to use X calculator' pages. Auto-generated from calculator list. Same template structure.
guides_125.gsc_impressions_28d: ~7 total across all 125 guides (only 'how-to-use-mortgage-calculator' has 7 imp)
guides_125.supports_money_page: MARGINALLY — links to parent calculator but provides no new value
guides_125.duplication_risk: HIGH — 125 pages with identical structure, only calculator name differs
guides_125.action_recommendation: REMOVE_FROM_SITEMAP — keep pages live but exclude from sitemap. These are user-facing but not search-engine-valuable.

thin_tools_66.description: Investment/tax/budget pre-calculated scenarios with 'yr' pattern (investment-Xk-Yyr, tax-Xk-single, etc.)
thin_tools_66.gsc_impressions_28d: 8 tools have impressions (compound-100k-20yr has 88 imp, compound-500k-15yr has 42 imp). 58 of 66 have 0 impressions.
thin_tools_66.unique_value_score: 20-40/100 — shows specific calculation result. Some have user value for specific scenarios.
thin_tools_66.supports_money_page: YES — investment scenarios link to compound-interest calculator
thin_tools_66.duplication_risk: MODERATE — similar structure but different inputs make each page distinct
thin_tools_66.action_recommendation: HOLD_FOR_REVIEW — 8 tools have GSC impressions (88+42+etc). Removing all 66 risks losing what little traffic the site has. Consider keeping tools with impressions, removing tools with 0 impressions.

note: AUDIT ONLY. No URLs removed from sitemap beyond the 3 polluted fixes. Full pruning decision deferred to Phase 32.5.
